data.title: 国际服指名手配2倍1 特别依赖2倍1
data.summary: [Double Drop Campaign Preview] From 12/14 (Tue), the amount of rewards dropped in Bounty & Commissio
data.body:
[Double Drop Campaign Preview]

From 12/14 (Tue), the amount of rewards dropped in Bounty & Commissions  will be doubled.
Don't miss out on this opportunity to develop your students!

🗓️Period
12/14 (Tue) After Maintenance – 12/20 (Mon) 18:59 (UTC)
